title: sphaeralcea abutiloides
intro: Sphaeralcea abutiloides, also known as the Desert Marigold or Orange Globe Mallow, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its bright orange daisy-like flowers and globular seed pods. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Sphaeralcea abutiloides have been shown to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Sphaeralcea abutiloides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used topically in creams and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
